reviews.comment:
Desde que la tomo el ACA la atención es malísima, hay islas cerradas, SI ISLAS CERRADAS! Bastante sucio todo. El aire para las ruedas se paga 🤦🏼‍♀️. En la playa ya no entregan más dinero.
Una pena, la gente de Torcuato no está acostumbrada a que te atiendan así.

(Translated by Google)
Since the ACA took over, the service has been terrible. There are closed islands—yes, closed islands! Everything is quite dirty. You have to pay for air in your tires 🤦🏼‍♀️. They no longer give out money on the beach.
It's a shame; the people of Torcuato aren't used to being treated like this.
